title: Bundle Pins
description: Add pins to your Bundles, stylizing and better organising them in the process!
body:
# 💰 Bundle Pins 📌
**Ever wanted to distinguish your Bundles, but with some ~flair~ ? Just pop your favourite gem with your bundle, and off you show!**
#
![3 Bundles, from left to right: Bundle with Gold Pin, majoritely filled, Bundle with Diamond Pin, empty, and Bundle with Iron Pin, just under halfway filled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2dc452ab356fd7765538f221c5147abe311bd68.png)
# 💎 Features
- **9 Variant Pins** allows for proper distinction between Bundles.
- **Coloured Bars** further clearly visualises the difference. 
- **Tooltip** shows which Pin the Bundle has. 
- **Recipe** is as simple as combining a Bundle, filled or empty, with it's corresponding item in a crafting space.
- **Data Driven**, allowing you to further add more Pins if desire.
- **Purely Cosmetic**, to not interfere with any other gameplay.
#
![3 Bundles, from left to right: Bundle with Copper Pin, barely filled, Bundle with Quartz Pin, filled just over half, and Bundle with Netherite Pin, empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2421df6bcf194b6af4255984ec90e12e1c59fff3.png)
# 🛠️ Recipe
![A Bundle Pin Recipe: A Bundle combined with a Gemstone, gives a Pinned Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qM8lYVgI/images/68a60a248989464f16dc6dd7aea9f146eed15a72.gif)
